installCommand: export RUSTUP_HOME=/rust CARGO_HOME=/rust && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && bun install
buildCommand: export PATH="/rust/bin:$PATH" && cd .. && wasm-pack build crates/gt-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../web/src/lib/wasm/pkg && cd web && bun run build
